changelog:
✨ Modern UI & Glassmorphism (v1.2.2-b168): 
🔹 Clearer Windows: Glass effect now covers the entire dialog for a premium, unified look.
🔹 Fixed Update Progress: Download bar and status updates now show in real-time.
🔹 Multi-Tasking: Added 'Run in Background' option during updates.
🔹 UI Polish: Improved spacing and fixed nested container visual issues in all pop-ups.
